prompt: Create an active PRD in docs/prds for a vendor quote comparison copilot. Use parent idea-00010-vendor-ops.
assertions: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/prds.
The new file front matter has type prd, role main, status active, and parent idea-00010-vendor-ops.
The new file includes the standard PRD sections and at least two FR-xx checklist items.
